title: strychnos urceolata
intro: Strychnos urceolata, also known as the African strychnine tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Loganiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural purgative and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Strychnos urceolata include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used to improve digestion and reduce pain. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are then used to treat various health issues, although its use should be approached with caution due to the presence of potentially toxic compounds.
